steps.title: Evaluate at the city border crossing
steps.content:
Since $x$ is hours after crossing the city border, $x = 0$ is the moment of crossing. Substituting into $f(x) = 50x + 8$:
$$f(0) = 50(0) + 8 = 8 \text{ km}$$
The train has traveled 8 km total by the moment it reaches the city border.

steps.title: Identify the source of the initial distance
steps.content:
The 8 km total distance at $x = 0$ must come from the segment between the station and the city border, since the train hasn't traveled any additional distance after crossing yet.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
